summary: Manuscript Update: Integrating Recent Neuroscience Findings
Brain Review Paper: Modularity, Integration, Recent Insights

message.content: update @generate_pdf.sh to work with the curent @manuscript_v2.md ; i.e. to convert it via latex to a pdf file.

content.text: I'll update the PDF generation script to work with `manuscript_v2.md`. Let me modify the script to use the correct filename and adjust any necessary settings.

input.old_string:
#!/bin/bash

# Aphantasia PDF Generation Script
# This script converts Aphantasia_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from Aphantasia_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' Aphantasia_v2.md > Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc Aphantasia_v2_pdf.md -o Aphantasia_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues in LaTeX
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex Aphantasia_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f Aphantasia_v2.aux Aphantasia_v2.log Aphantasia_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check Aphantasia_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh Aphantasia_v2.pdf

#!/bin/bash

# Manuscript PDF Generation Script
# This script converts manuscript_v2.md to a publication-ready PDF

echo "🔄 Starting PDF generation from manuscript_v2.md..."

# Step 1: Create PDF-ready version with figure references
echo "📝 Step 1: Converting TIFF references to PDF references..."
sed 's/\.tiff)/\.pdf)/g' manuscript_v2.md > manuscript_v2_pdf.md

# Step 2: Convert markdown to LaTeX
echo "📝 Step 2: Converting markdown to LaTeX..."
pandoc manuscript_v2_pdf.md -o manuscript_v2.tex --standalone -V geometry:margin=3cm

# Step 3: Fix unicode issues in LaTeX
echo "🔧 Step 3: Fixing unicode symbols..."
# Replace sigma symbol
sed -i '' 's/σ/$\\sigma$/g' manuscript_v2.tex
# Replace beta symbols  
sed -i '' 's/β/$\\beta$/g' manuscript_v2.tex

# Step 4: Compile LaTeX to PDF
echo "🏗️  Step 4: Compiling LaTeX to PDF..."
pdflatex manuscript_v2.tex

# Step 5: Run pdflatex again to resolve cross-references
echo "🔄 Step 5: Second pass for cross-references..."
pdflatex manuscript_v2.tex > /dev/null 2>&1

# Step 6: Clean up auxiliary files
echo "🧹 Step 6: Cleaning up auxiliary files..."
rm -f manuscript_v2.aux manuscript_v2.log manuscript_v2.out

echo "✅ PDF generation complete! Check manuscript_v2.pdf"
echo "📊 File info:"
ls -lh manuscript_v2.pdf

content.text:
The script has been updated to work with `manuscript_v2.md`. The changes include:

- Updated the input file from `Aphantasia_v2.md` to `manuscript_v2.md`
- Changed all intermediate and output filenames accordingly
- Updated the script description and echo messages
- Maintained all the existing functionality for LaTeX conversion and Unicode symbol handling

The script will now convert `manuscript_v2.md` to a PDF through LaTeX, handling TIFF-to-PDF reference conversion and Unicode symbols as before.
